CheckTitle: Okta password policies require numeric characters
Description: **Okta Password Policy numeric complexity** should require at least one number in every active policy.
Risk: **Missing numeric complexity requirements** reduce password search space and make brute-force or guessing attacks easier for users under weaker policies.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Require at least one numeric character in every active Okta Password Policy** and retire policy exceptions that weaken complexity.
